title: neoholmgrenia hilgardii
intro: Neoholmgrenia hilgardii is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Gentianaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate gastrointestinal issues due to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Neoholmgrenia hilgardii include treating symptoms of indigestion, nausea, and stomach cramps, as well as potential anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of Neoholmgrenia hilgardii can be made into teas or infusions for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in humans.
